qa_matrix.question_text: Have you ever been diagnosed and treated for any of following conditions or are currently being treated or underwent surgery for High blood pressure,Hypertension ,Elevated Cholesterol,Lipids?
qa_matrix.suggested_correction: Doctor should ask about high blood pressure/cholesterol.

qa_matrix.question_text: Have you ever been diagnosed and treated for any of following conditions or are currently being treated or underwent surgery for Chest pain, heart attack, palpitation, any other heart disease or circulatory disease?
qa_matrix.suggested_correction: Doctor should ask about heart/circulatory diseases.

qa_matrix.question_text: Have you ever been diagnosed and treated for any of following conditions or are currently being treated or underwent surgery for Any lung,respiratory Disease or Urine,Kidney disease or any Liver ,gastric disorders?
qa_matrix.expected_response: Yes Exact Diagnosis - Kidney stones Date of Diagnosis or Duration of disorder - 01/04/2023 Treatment details - Medication Reflex test - Remarks - LA was diagnosed with 3 kidney stones in 01/04/2023. Among them 1 kidney stone was 7mm and the other 2 are tiny. Stomach pain is the symptom. Doctor advised medication for 1 week, and the large kidney stone was passed away, but not sure about the 2 tiny stones. Fully recovered without any symptoms and complications.
qa_matrix.suggested_correction: Doctor should have asked question 17 directly. Information about kidney stones was volunteered later.

qa_matrix.question_text: Have you ever been diagnosed and treated for any of following conditions or are currently being treated or underwent surgery for Cancer or tumor of any kind?
Do you or your spouse has been tested positive or is under treatment for HIV , AIDS or Sexually transmitted diseases (e.g. syphilis, gonorrhea, etc.)?
Have you ever been diagnosed and treated for any of following conditions or are currently being treated or underwent surgery for Any Accidental injury ,Disability or impairment?
qa_matrix.suggested_correction: Doctor should ask about accidental injury/disability.

qa_matrix.question_text: Do you have any other health condition or are you currently/in past were under any treatment for any health condition not covered above?
qa_matrix.suggested_correction: Doctor should ask about other health conditions.

qa_matrix.question_text: Have you undergone any investigations like blood ,urine test , X -ray , ECG or any special test such as TMT , CT scan, MRI?
qa_matrix.expected_response: Yes Reason for undergoing test - Annual healthcheck up/Blood donation/Routine healthcheck up(Self/Company) Results of the test - Normal Past Surgery - Remarks - LA undergone annual health check 2 years back. Reports are normal.
qa_matrix.suggested_correction: Doctor should have asked question 22 directly. Information about annual health checkup and vitamin D deficiency was volunteered later.

qa_matrix.question_text: Have you ever been hospitalized for any illness, sickness, disease, injury , accident or disorder in the last 5 years?
qa_matrix.captured_response: Yeah, I was hospitalized for dengue in October 2024.
qa_matrix.expected_response: Yes Disorder Details - Dengue > 6 month Remarks - LA was diagnosed with dengue fever in 01/10/2024. Hospitalized for 4days.Doctor advised medications and fully recovered without any symptoms, treatment and complications.

qa_matrix.question_text: [For Male]Have you ever been diagnosed &/OR treated for Prostate related disorder or been under follow up for the same with PSA test, USG pelvis etc.
[For Female] Are you currently pregnant ?
[For Female] Have you undergone any gynaecological investigations for any problems of breast , uterus , cervix etc.Have you done or advised for any Pap smear , mammogram?

[For Female] Have you ever consulted a doctor because of an irregularity at the breast, vagina, uterus, ovary , fallopian tubes, menstruation, complications during pregnancy or child delivery or a sexually transmitted disease?

Is there anything else that you would like to share with us with respect to your health,habits or anything else that you believe is important to ensure that policy is processed basis all facts & information?
qa_matrix.captured_response: I had kidney stones in the past... It was in uh I think April 2023... It was two or three... You can mention three... I think it was 7 mm... 7 mm stone has been passed away... No other surgery or nothing... I'm not sure [if tiny stones are present]... Symptoms of pain, pain on the left side, I think, or the right side... Only the stomach pain, sir? No vomitting or any other? No... I don't remember [diameter of other stones]. They were tiny... Yeah, yeah, of course [fully recovered]... No, nothing [no further symptoms]... I would say fully recovered... Yeah, fully recovered. I've never felt that pain again. Annual health check up and dengue. Yeah, that vitamin D came up in the health checkup.
qa_matrix.expected_response: Yes - Notings Exact Diagnosis - Others (Please specify) Date of Diagnosis/Duration of disorder - Treatment details - Current health status - Availability of reports - Next follow up - Remarks - LA was diagnosed with vitamin D deficiency in 01/01/2023. Doctor advised medication for 2months and fully recovered without any symptoms and complications.

critical_issues: Multiple mandatory medical history questions (Q12, Q13, Q14, Q15, Q16, Q18, Q19, Q20, Q21) were not asked by the doctor.

Information regarding kidney stones (relevant to Q17) and annual health checkup/vitamin D deficiency (relevant to Q22) was volunteered by the customer under Q28, rather than being elicited by the doctor asking the specific questions. This indicates a deviation from the structured questioning process.
recommendations: The doctor should adhere strictly to the MER questionnaire, ensuring all mandatory questions are asked in sequence.
Training should be provided to ensure the doctor covers all medical history questions (Q12-Q22) as per the MER.
Reinforce the importance of eliciting information through direct questioning rather than relying solely on volunteered information, even if volunteered information is subsequently probed.

customer_satisfaction_indicators: Customer is cooperative and provides detailed answers.
Doctor is patient in clarifying details (e.g., ID proof, full length view, kidney stone details).

examples: Prithvi, hold this phone like this.

meta.insurance_company: Tata AIA Life Insurance Company Ltd.

greetings.explanation: Doctor initiated the call with greetings.

call_opening.explanation: Doctor introduced herself, confirmed the client's name, and mentioned the insurer.

language_preference.explanation: Doctor confirmed the customer's language preference.

id_validation.explanation: Doctor requested ID proof, PAN card number, and a full-length view for verification.

disclaimer.explanation: Doctor clearly stated the purpose of the call, recording, and the implications of incorrect information.

politeness.explanation: Doctor consistently used polite language and addressed the customer respectfully.

empathy.explanation: No serious health concerns (accident, operation, severe illness) were discussed that would require explicit empathy.

communication_skills.explanation: Doctor communicated clearly, confirmed information, and provided clear instructions for video verification.

probing.explanation: Doctor thoroughly probed into all disclosed medical conditions, asking for details, dates, treatments, and recovery status.

observations.explanation: No customer hesitation or third-party prompting (feeding answers) was observed.

call_closure.explanation: Doctor initiated the declaration, but the customer read the declaration instead. Doctor concluded with a thank you.
